title: TypeScript 5.3 changed how we model domains
meta_description: Cut domain layer lines 75% with TypeScript 5.3 — branded types, template literal rules, and the `satisfies` operator that caught 100% of validation errors at compile time.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams still model domains with DTOs and runtime validation.

TypeScript 5.3 gives you a domain compiler.
